title: Prompt Injection & Red Teaming
description: Master prompt injection attacks and red teaming methodologies to identify vulnerabilities in LLM-powered applications. Architect defensive layers, including system prompt hardening and input sanitization, to mitigate adversarial attacks like jailbreaking or indirect prompt injection.
objectives: Master prompt injection attacks and red teaming methodologies to identify vulnerabilities in LLM-powered applications.
Architect defensive layers, including system prompt hardening and input sanitization, to mitigate adversarial attacks like jailbreaking or indirect prompt injection.
